text: As I stand in front of this showcase labeled 'R+D,' I feel a mix of curiosity and displacement. The futuristic, almost clinical look of the space suggests innovation and inquiry, yet the environment also feels cold and impersonal. The glowing screens and bright signage command my attention, but I find myself searching for deeper meaning beyond the surface of technology and research. There is a hum of anticipation here, an invitation to question and explore, yet I sense a subtle anxiety—an uncertainty about how humans fit into this rapidly developing narrative of progress.
